name: gas-api-only
description: Google Apps Script web-app JSON API (server only).

scripts.build:full: pnpm typecheck && pnpm format && pnpm lint:fix && pnpm build
scripts.push: pnpm lint:fix && pnpm format && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && ncp .clasp-dev.json .clasp.json && clasp push --force
scripts.push:prod: pnpm lint:fix && pnpm format && pnpm typecheck && pnpm build && ncp .clasp-prod.json .clasp.json && clasp push --force
